hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|--force|--hard|push.*-f)'; then echo 'DENY: destructive command blocked'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'components/ui/'; then echo 'DENY: components/ui/ is managed by shadcn/ui. Wrap and extend instead of modifying directly.'; exit 2; fi

echo '## Context Recovery
프로젝트: dev-nexus (Next.js 16 + Tailwind + shadcn/ui)
워크플로우: typecheck → lint → build
규칙: components/ui/ 수정 금지, Server Component 기본, 다크모드 필수
CLAUDE.md와 .claude/docs/ 참조할 것'

powershell -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(3000, 'Claude Code', 'Task notification', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $n.Dispose()" 2>/dev/null || echo '\a'

powershell -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms') | Out-Null; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(3000, 'Claude Code', 'Work completed', 'Info'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $n.Dispose()" 2>/dev/null || true
